prompt: Distill a README project intro into shortest version preserving what/why/how.

assertions.name: compression_ratio
assertions.description: Output is at least 60% shorter than input by word count

assertions.name: what_preserved
assertions.description: Answers 'what is it' — CLI for managing local dev services (databases, queues, caches)

assertions.name: why_preserved
assertions.description: Answers 'why' — onboarding friction and environment drift

assertions.name: no_ambiguity
assertions.description: One interpretation only — no vague or abstract phrasing
